name: ai-sdk-integration
question: How to integrate AI SDK with existing MCP infrastructure?
decision: Replace agent.chat MCP tool internals with AI SDK streamText() using claudeCode() provider. Keep MCP interface unchanged.
rationale: Frontend continues using mcpService.streamChat() unchanged. Only the implementation switches from @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk to ai-sdk-provider-claude-code. MCP interface provides stability.
